description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a long, icy blue blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade features a jagged, crystalline motif near the hilt, giving it an appearance reminiscent of frost or ice shards. The hilt is dark and angular, with a looped guard and a pointed pommel, suggesting both functionality and a fantasy-inspired design. The transition between the blade and the hilt is marked by a burst of spiked, frosted elements, enhancing its visual impact. The overall color palette is dominated by cool blues and dark grays, with a subtle gradient along the blade. The sword appears to be crafted from metal with decorative elements that mimic the look of ice or crystal.
description: A fantasy-inspired sword with an icy blue, jagged blade and a dark, angular hilt featuring frosted, crystalline motifs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the icy blue blade and the spiked, crystalline motif near the hilt.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the symmetrical, angular hilt.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade's jagged edge and the frosted burst at the hilt.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the narrow profile and the pointed pommel.
attribute_handle_design: angular, dark, looped guard, pointed pommel, no visible grip texture
attribute_ornamentation: crystalline, frosted motifs near the hilt
